# nomad_acl_policies (Data Source)

Retrieve a list of ACL Policies.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_acl_policies" "example" {
  prefix = "prod"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `prefix` (String) ACL Policy Name Prefix

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `policies` (List of Object) ACL Policies (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies))

<a id="nestedatt--policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policies`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `name` (String)
